prompt: Please update AGENTS.md based on what we learned today. We discovered that rg is faster than grep in this repo, that we should use apply_patch for single-file edits, and that we should run get_errors after edits. Show me proposed additions first; do not apply yet.
assertions: Includes a proposed diff block rather than immediately applying edits
Contains an explicit approval question before any file change
Captures at least two durable, actionable learnings from the prompt
